fields.title: Add shared Ralph execution contract resolver and applier
fields.description: Ralph execution contract capture, application, configuration, /agents scoping, and agent spawning need one shared service boundary. Without it, tool/agent/model/sandbox behavior will be duplicated across Ralph command code, agents menu code, and AgentControl.
fields.design: Create a Ralph contract resolver/applier service that works from canonical loop state and Pi runtime adapters. It should resolve Ralph session scope from cwd + session file without relying on currentLoopRef, capture a pure Ralph contract without mutating tau:state, validate pinned tools/agents/model/thinking/sandbox/control-tool availability, and apply the effective contract to controller and child sessions. Effective child tools = pinned user tools plus system-managed ralph_continue/ralph_finish; controller tools = pinned user tools. The service should expose helpers used by /ralph start, /ralph resume/runLoop, /ralph configure, /agents, and AgentControl.
fields.acceptance_criteria: There is one shared service/helper for Ralph contract scope resolution, capture, validation, and application; it reads canonical .pi/loops/state rather than Ralph facade status for lifecycle-sensitive decisions; capture does not persist to tau:state; contract validation covers missing tools, agents, model/auth, thinking mismatch, sandbox applicability, and missing Ralph control tools; tests cover controller vs child effective tool sets and ambiguous ownership.
